# YOUR CODE HERE
import sys
from collections import deque

def main():
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input.split()
    N, M = int(data[0]), int(data[1])
    grid = data[2:2+N]

    visited = [[False] * M for _ in range(N)]
    q = deque()
    q.append((1, 1))  # (i, j) 0-based
    visited[1][1] = True

    directions = [(-1, 0), (1, 0), (0, -1), (0, 1)]  # up, down, left, right

    while q:
        i, j = q.popleft()
        for di, dj in directions:
            ni, nj = i, j
            while True:
                next_i, next_j = ni + di, nj + dj
                if 0 <= next_i < N and 0 <= next_j < M and grid[next_i][next_j] == '.':
                    ni, nj = next_i, next_j
                else:
                    break
            if not visited[ni][nj]:
                visited[ni][nj] = True
                q.append((ni, nj))

    count = sum(sum(row) for row in visited)
    print(count)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
